sprint.name: Forge Expansion Sprint
sprint.note: A scheduled review is not a guaranteed release. The forge publishes at most one coherent change when it clears the quality and safety gates; otherwise it skips the window.
sprint.secondaryAutomation: A separate GitHub Actions workflow runs Tuesday and Friday at 15:17 UTC. It can only create or improve approved declarative-engine apps and records accepted publishes in this ledger.

method.label: Inspect
method.description: Review the live site, repository, current apps, open feedback, bugs, depth, accessibility, and portfolio gaps.

method.label: Compare
method.description: Consider at least three candidate changes and choose the one that creates the strongest useful depth or breadth.

method.label: Build one
method.description: Create or improve one coherent feature or app, including mobile, keyboard, touch, reduced-motion, teardown, and edge cases.

method.label: Validate
method.description: Run JavaScript syntax checks, feedback-routing tests, registry rules, required-file checks, and safety-boundary validation.

method.label: Publish or skip
method.description: Merge and deploy only after every required check passes. Skip when the candidate is weak, unsafe, duplicative, or incomplete.

qualityGates: One coherent change maximum per review window
No secrets, trackers, accounts, hidden storage, or unreviewed network behavior
No direct execution of user feedback
Mobile, keyboard, touch, focus, and reduced-motion behavior considered
Repository validation must pass before main is published

queue.title: Wind navigation variants
queue.reason: Only expand wind-navigation play if future work adds distinct wind grammars, accessible flight summaries, route contracts, multi-kite coordination, weather ethics, or richer forecast and line-tension tradeoffs rather than more marker labels.

queue.title: Potion combinatorics variants
queue.reason: Only expand potion-balancing play if future work adds distinct recipe grammars, accessible brew summaries, drag-to-cauldron support, multi-cauldron timing, apprentice requests, or richer ingredient synergies rather than more ingredient labels.

queue.title: Cave exploration variants
queue.reason: Only expand cave-exploration play if future work adds distinct cave grammars, accessible route summaries, multi-explorer coordination, rescue contracts, environmental ethics, or richer fog-of-war and exit-risk tradeoffs rather than more specimen labels.

queue.title: Clockwork routing variants
queue.reason: Only expand timing-routing play if future work adds distinct gear grammars, accessible mechanism summaries, multi-source clocks, musical timing contracts, or richer jam and over-winding tradeoffs rather than more bird labels.

queue.title: Museum security variants

queue.title: Astronomy scheduling variants

queue.title: Audio memory variants

recentDecisions.title: Kite Cartographer 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a standalone local wind-navigation arcade strategy game with gust forecasting, drag and keyboard steering, tension and stamina resources, marker routing, reel and dive recovery choices, adaptive modes, session-only storm-front unlock, scoring, responsive canvas motion, reduced-motion behavior, optional local audio, and teardown.
